merchantAccount.description: The merchant account identifier, with which you want to process the transaction.

originalReference.description: The original pspReference of the payment to modify.

reference.description:
Your reference for the payment modification. This reference is visible in Customer Area and in reports.
Maximum length: 80 characters.

store.description: The physical store, for which this payment is processed.

uniqueTerminalId.description: The unique ID of a POS terminal.
